headline: IREN Soars 17%; Applied Digital, TeraWulf, Core Scientific Surge in a Data Center Rebound
summary: Four battered AI infrastructure stocks are staging a violent Monday morning bounce after losing up to 43% in a single month, but the question dividing bulls and bears is whether the buying signals a real shift or just a dead-cat relief pop before the next leg down.
